_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v17 ALL DRAFTS: 105368 entries. goof 10361, leduc 9561, liars 19192, gin 9071, hex 15391, oth 13354, clob 28438. No think blocks. System prompts match eval. All score fields present. HF synced 2026-03-29.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-29: v17 full drafts per user directive. 105368/105368 valid. No missing score. HF synced.

NAVWORLD.notes: V8 COMPLETE. 10006 canonical. tool_calls field fix applied (5836 entries). Standard OpenAI multi-round format. HF synced. In training on m3 (TRL, 87391 total, 0 skipped).
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-28: tool_calls fix only. Multi-round structure preserved (matches eval). 10006/10006 valid. Gen code fixed to include tools field for future batches.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 1641 canonical (3.3x target). 20/40 workers on m1. 1404 OK / 8867 attempted (16%). GPT-5.4. Daemon autonomous.

LIVEWEB.notes: v4 optimized. 30000 composite-only. Prioritized stooq+hackernews (weakest in eval). 5 plugins: hybrid 22.7%, hackernews 22.2%, taostats 18.6%, coingecko 18.5%, stooq 18.1%. 3338 unique templates, max 64/template. ms-swift compatible. HF synced 2026-03-30.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-30: 30000/30000 valid. forge data audit ALL PASS. HF synced.

MEMORYGYM.notes: v4e: 20000 balanced per-event samples. Mixed tiers (lite 30%/standard 50%/hard 20%). Distribution: ingest 30%/correction 20%/question 45%/noise 5%. Median 1.5K, max 10.3K, 0% >32K. Write ≤2000 enforced. 28 unique noise responses. HF synced.
